creator: mail@void.so
text:
(In reply to Po-Chuan Hsieh from comment #3)

* databases/tarantool-c does not need to be updated since there were no new releases

* please set maintainer on database/tarantool* and devel/msgpuck to <balaev@tarantool.org>

I will test tarantool-c and ngx_http_tarantool(nginx/nginx-devel) with msgpuck@0c6680a and if it OK I will send a bug with updated msgpuck port and update this patch respectively.

Am I understanding the direction correctly?
